data.title: Ethereum's Potential Surge Against Bitcoin by Year's End
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Ethereum's native token, Ether (ETH), is poised for significant growth against Bitcoin (BTC) by the end of the year, driven by a bullish reversal pattern on its weekly chart. The ETH/BTC pair has been developing an inverse-head-and-shoulders (IH&S) pattern since early September, characterized by three troughs with the deepest in the middle, beneath a common neckline resistance at 0.0420 BTC. This technical setup suggests that a breakout above the neckline could propel ETH/BTC to approximately 0.066 BTC, marking a 75% increase from current levels.

Further bullish indicators include the impending formation of a golden cross between Ethereum's 20-week exponential moving average (EMA) and its 50-week EMA. Historically, a similar crossover in July 2020 led to a 250% surge in ETH/BTC rates, following a brief overbought correction. This time, a dip into the 0.033–0.045 BTC support zone, aligning with the 20- and 50-week EMAs, could act as a catalyst for a rebound, reinforcing the IH&S breakout scenario.

However, ETH/BTC faces significant resistance levels before confirming a full breakout. The first major hurdle is the 200-week EMA near 0.045 BTC, a level that has consistently thwarted upward movements over the past two years. Beyond this lies a more formidable barrier: a long-term downward trendline that has defined Ethereum's peaks against Bitcoin since 2017. Should ETH/BTC manage to close above the 200-week EMA, it could challenge this trendline, currently positioned in the 0.050–0.055 BTC range. Despite these obstacles, Ether still holds the potential for 15-30% growth compared to Bitcoin this year.

It is important to note that this article does not offer investment advice or recommendations. All investment and trading activities involve risk, and readers are encouraged to conduct their own research before making any decisions.

data.title: Why Ethereum price can surge 75% versus Bitcoin by New Year’s
data.description:
An inverse head-and-shoulders pattern and bullish momentum signals point to ETH gaining ground on Bitcoin in the weeks ahead.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/why-ethereum-price-can-surge-75-versus-bitcoin-by-new-year-s?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: CoreonMCP Secures Strategic Investment to Enhance AI and Web3 Integration
data.description:
According to Foresight News, AI and Web3 execution engine CoreonMCP has announced strategic investments from Alpha Capital, BD Ventures, BuzzBridge Capital, Captain Capital, and Gemhead Capital. The specific investment amounts have not been disclosed. The team stated that this round of funding will accelerate CoreonMCP's integration and expansion within the BNB ecosystem, aiming to establish it as a unified execution layer for AI and Web3. This development is intended to support developers, protocols, and applications in accessing reliable, composable, and traceable AI toolchains.

CoreonMCP is designed specifically for Web3 scenarios, capable of transforming natural language into multi-step ToolCall execution chains. This functionality enables on-chain queries, token analysis, risk identification, and the generation of verifiable analytical reports. Currently, CoreonMCP has launched three modules: CLI, Server API, and Telegram Bot, allowing users and developers to quickly access its AI execution capabilities through command line, local private deployment, or social platform assistants. Looking ahead, the team plans to advance scenario-based applications such as wallet assistants, DEX Copilot, and security monitoring.

data.title: Yunfeng Financial Group Appoints Geoff Jiang Guofei as Web3 Development Chair
data.description: According to PANews, Yunfeng Financial Group, backed by Jack Ma, has appointed former Ant Group executive Geoff Jiang Guofei as the chair of its Web3 Development Committee. This move further clarifies the company's strategic focus in the Web3 sector. Jiang previously led Ant Group's blockchain project Trusple and served as the head of the Fintech Lab at the Damo Academy. Recently, Yunfeng completed its first real-world asset tokenization project and acquired 10,000 Ethereum tokens for $44 million as part of its strategic reserve. The group plans to advance tokenization solutions across various asset classes.

data.title: Solana Foundation Chair Advocates for Revenue as Key Metric in Crypto
data.description: According to Foresight News, Solana Foundation Chair Lily Liu has suggested that it is time to consider revenue as the primary metric for evaluating protocols. Liu noted that when the DeFi phenomenon emerged in 2020, Total Value Locked (TVL) was a useful standard for normalizing across DeFi protocols. In a rapidly growing environment, focusing on early-stage metrics was logical, similar to how the internet took a decade to use clicks and user numbers as upstream indicators for revenue valuation. Revenue was then scaled through two main business models: search and social advertising monetization, and commissions from bilateral markets. However, since 2020, the cryptocurrency industry has matured, and with the presence of revenue, industry metrics must evolve accordingly. Solana applications generated $193 million in revenue in August.

data.title: Understanding Binance's P2P Shield Merchant Program for Secure Trading
data.description:
Binance Blog published a new article, introducing the Binance P2P Shield Merchant Program, which aims to enhance security and reliability in peer-to-peer (P2P) trading. This initiative is designed to provide users with a safer trading environment by vetting and verifying merchants who demonstrate extensive experience and reliability on the platform. Shield Merchants are traders who have been active for over 90 days and have completed transactions with numerous unique counterparties. They are required to maintain a security deposit on the platform, serving as a financial guarantee of their commitment to secure trading.

The Shield Merchant Program involves a rigorous review process conducted by Binance to ensure that these merchants promote safe and reliable trading practices. Users can easily identify Shield Merchants by looking for a distinct shield icon next to the merchants’ names on the Binance P2P platform. This icon signifies an enhanced level of security and integrity for their transactions. The program is particularly beneficial for users in regions where traditional fiat on- and off-ramps are limited, as it offers a flexible and accessible way to exchange digital assets for fiat or other cryptocurrencies.

To further bolster P2P trading safety, Binance has implemented the Shield Merchant User Protection Program. This program reviews and verifies P2P merchants who have a positive transaction history, no negative feedback regarding frozen bank accounts, and meet other stringent criteria. Merchants who pass the review receive a special badge next to their names, indicating their adherence to high standards and reliable trading behavior. By trading with Shield Merchants, users benefit from an added layer of security and peace of mind, knowing that these merchants have been thoroughly vetted.

For users who prefer to trade exclusively with Shield Merchants, Binance P2P offers a "Shield Only" filter. This feature allows users to view only offers from verified Shield Merchants, ensuring a secure trading experience. Additionally, Binance provides a compensation policy for users whose bank accounts are frozen due to reasons attributable to the merchant, offering up to 100% compensation depending on the user's jurisdiction. This policy is subject to review by the Binance P2P team to ensure fairness and compliance.

The introduction of the Shield Merchant Program addresses safety concerns in P2P trading by elevating verified merchants and providing users with the transparency needed to trade more comfortably and securely. Binance continues to innovate and invest in security-centric technologies and enhanced platform features to make crypto markets safer and more accessible for users of all experience levels. Whether new to Binance P2P or a seasoned trader, choosing Shield Merchants helps users trade smarter and safer, offering a seamless trading experience with enhanced security.

data.title: Binance Alpha will list Kyuzo's Friends (KO) on September 20th
data.description: According to official news, Kyuzo's Friends (KO) will be listed on Binance Alpha on September 20. Eligible users can claim the airdrop using Binance Alpha Points on the Alpha event page after Alpha trading opens.

The central bank warned Canada risks falling behind without federal stablecoin regulation as domestic adoption accelerates.

data.title: Dormant Wallet Sells Ethereum for Stablecoins After Three Years
data.description: According to PANews, a previously inactive cryptocurrency wallet has sold 2,086 ETH at a price of $4,544 each, totaling $9.48 million in DAI, USDC, and RLUSDC. This transaction marks the first activity from the wallet in three years. The wallet still retains 2,779 ETH, with an estimated market value of approximately $12.6 million.

data.title: Wall Street, Walled Gardens. Why Private Blockchains Will Fail
data.description:
Private blockchains promised control, but ended up cutting off trust, users, and liquidity. This op-ed explores why open networks are winning.
source: https://cryptonews.com/exclusives/wall-street-walled-gardens-why-private-blockchains-will-fail/

data.title: Jim Cramer Calls TeraWulf “Kaput” as Miner Bets on Clean Energy Future
data.description:
TeraWulf (NASDAQ:WULF) faces sharp criticism from Jim Cramer, who called the stock “kaput,” even as the bitcoin miner secures an 80-year lease in New York.

The post Jim Cramer Calls TeraWulf “Kaput” as Miner Bets on Clean Energy Future first appeared on Ecoinimist.

data.title: Bitcoin Mining Difficulty Reaches New High with Recent Adjustment
data.description: According to PANews, Bitcoin mining difficulty experienced an adjustment at 22:47 UTC+8 last night, at block height 915,264. The difficulty increased by 4.63% to reach 142.34 T, setting a new historical record.

data.title: Canadian police seize $40 million in crypto assets after shutting down TradeOgre
data.description: The Royal Canadian Mounted Police (RCMP) announced that they have shut down the unregistered local cryptocurrency exchange TradeOgre and seized crypto assets worth 56 million Canadian dollars (approximately 40 million US dollars), the largest cryptocurrency seizure in Canadian history. TradeOgre was reportedly under investigation since June 2024, following a Europol investigation. Police discovered that the platform operated as an unregistered money services business, failed to conduct customer identification, and was suspected of laundering criminal funds. The exchange has been shut down. (The Block)

data.title: BARD is now listed on Bitget CandyBomb, and contract trading unlocks token airdrops
data.description: Bitget CandyBomb has launched BARD, a project with a total prize pool of 50,000 BARD. Individuals can earn up to 200 BARD by completing specific contract trading volume tasks. Detailed rules are available on the Bitget official platform. To participate, click the "Join Now" button to register. The event ends at 2:00 PM (UTC+8) on September 26th.

data.title: Binance Alpha to Feature Kyuzo's Friends (KO)
data.description: Binance announced on X that Binance Alpha will be the first platform to feature Kyuzo's Friends (KO) on September 20, 2025.Eligible users can claim their airdrop using Binance Alpha Points on the Alpha Events page once trading opens. Further details will be announced soon.

data.title: Binance: Astra Nova Booster task verification API is temporarily interrupted, and officials are working with the project to resolve the issue
data.description: Binance Wallet officially announced on the X platform that due to an API outage for verification tasks in Phase 1 of the Astra Nova Booster program, some users are temporarily unable to complete verification. They are working closely with the project team to resolve the issue and are encouraged to try again later.

data.title: Nasdaq-listed GMTech Inc. and WebKey have reached a strategic partnership
data.description: Nasdaq-listed GMTech Inc. (NASDAQ: GMTH) announced a strategic partnership with WebKey, marking the official launch of WebKey's 1+N global capital market strategy. WebKey's affiliated funds in Dubai, the United States, and the British Virgin Islands (BVI) have successfully secured SEC, SFC, and MiCA licenses, enabling compliant capital operations for RWAs and STOs. Under this strategic partnership, GMTech and WebKey will jointly develop blockchain financial infrastructure and mobile ecosystems, driving innovation in stock market capitalization and liquidity.
